texto: When I decided to leave the military, I realized that the skills I acquired there were transferable to the commercial world both in leadership and the information technology field. I made the decision to move to Oracle because of its strong leadership role.
explicacao: Citação de Keith Kellogg sobre temas ligados a lideranca. “When I decided to leave the military, I realized that the skills I acquired there were transferab…” articula lideranca, technology, strong em registro de lideranca, com relevância para contextos como strong e world.
